/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/pointcloud_classifier/pointcloud_classifier_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/pointcloud_classifier_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/pointcloud_classifier/_pointcloud_classifier_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/polinaus/pointcloud_classifier/build/pointcloud_classifier:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libpointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_py.so libpointcloud_classifier__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so libpointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
